name: SRI SANKARA SENIOR SECONDARY SCHOOL - Adyar

itemReviewed.name: SRI SANKARA SENIOR SECONDARY SCHOOL - Adyar

itemListElement.reviewBody: one of the worst school in Chennai ,one of the worst teachers is Tamil teacher Revathi and SivagamaSundari

itemReviewed.name: SRI SANKARA SENIOR SECONDARY SCHOOL - Adyar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Really wondering i too experienced the same  here how the management or principal  has not taken action  e against these teachers like Revathi  the tamil teacher who uses foul language towards the children, these teachers Revathi, Roopa Ramesh,  kirthi Praveen  , Malavikha , hindi teacher Raji, can check with the children whether these teachers are addicted to cell phone, and deeply involve in the cellphone during class hours , many times complained to the Principal also,. not taken any action against these because Mita Venkatesh don't want any issues she wants only salary  . No punctuality among children after bell rings also children can come before the end of the first period no discipline among children any hair style can do, no nail trimming among children scratch each other, All these thing we took these issues  many times to the Principal and vice principal Vidya lakshmi, but every thing in the deaf hear

itemReviewed.name: SRI SANKARA SENIOR SECONDARY SCHOOL - Adyar

itemListElement.reviewBody: On behalf of all the  parents bringing notice to the management, many times complained about this to the Principal and vice principal no step as taken so far , the get  as a feedback in the PTA meeting  then  the paper goes in the trash , several times complained about the teacher Roopa Ramesh who is unfit to handle the 6th and 7th social  science,  just reads the book that's it any single query related about the subject unfit to clear the doubt , before allocating the respective subjects to the teachers it's the duty of the principal to interview them thoroughly whether they are eligible to handle the middle class. As a parent we know these teachers Roopa Ramesh, kèerthi Pravin,  are unfit to handle the primary class there too they read the book don't to explain the topic or clear the doubts . Principal mam pls check the teaching of English teachers like Malavikha Giridaran,   see how the teacher teaches  in the class, requesting the management to watch single time definitely the future generation English will be poor , teacher will not  show any initiative to improve the child, performance ,All these issues  supports by the principal because Mita mam gets good package  she don't disturb the teachers let them teach or not , let the teachers  sit and watch cell phone in the class doesn't matter,  Anyways Principal will not come for rounds sits inside the  fourwalls ,  for sure she don't come for rounds like other principals ,depends on vice principal who goes rarely for.  rounds and supports these sleepy teachers and gives wrong information and acts wisely to become principal .

itemReviewed.name: SRI SANKARA SENIOR SECONDARY SCHOOL - Adyar

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the Worst school i have experienced ,the teachers are really horrible, especially Tamil teacher Revathi she is very very worst  who doesn't treat the children in good manner and she speaks bad language in the class .Especially she is making groupism with other teachers like shivagma sundari and faced worst experience with other teachers also The principal and Vice Principal  like Vidhya Lakshmi doesn't even come for rounds and another horrible teacher i have faced i would recommend if your child  needs good education. Start thinking from now to switch off from the school...... like this teachers if the please dont make child education life spoil  in joining this school

itemReviewed.name: SRI SANKARA SENIOR SECONDARY SCHOOL - Adyar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Excellent school..
Has some of the best teachers in the city..
Received the best education that helped me even during college...
